title: Alligator - Bluey Colouring Set, Colouring Books for Children, Colouring Pencils, Resusable Stickers, Bluey Book, Bluey Colouring Book, Colouring Books, Kids Colouring Books
features: ALL-INCLUSIVE SET: The Bluey Colouring Set invites kids to join Bluey and family with 8 engaging colouring sheets, 6 vibrant colouring pencils, and a bonus sheet of reusable stickers, making it a standout among bluey books and colouring books for children.

EDUCATIONAL & ENTERTAINING: Beyond a regular colouring book, this set captures the charm of the Bluey series, blending creativity with learning, and becoming a favorite among kids colouring books enthusiasts.

IMAGINATIVE ADVENTURES: Featuring a variety of colouring sheets with Bluey, Bingo, and their friends, children can dive into hours of imaginative play, colouring, and storytelling inspired by the beloved Bluey characters.

PORTABLE & PRACTICAL: Designed for young artists and Bluey fans, this colouring set is compact and travel-friendly, perfect for on-the-go fun, holidays, or everyday use, ensuring creativity is always at hand.

PERFECT GIFT: Whether for a birthday, holiday, or special occasion, the Bluey Colouring Set by Alligator Products Ltd. gives to delight bluey colouring book enthusiasts. It's a captivating and engaging gift choice for young fans eager to embark on creative adventures with Bluey and family!
description: Product Description Unleash boundless imagination with ALLIGATOR's "Bluey Colouring Set"! This vibrant kit features 8 delightful colouring sheets, each showcasing the beloved Bluey and her playful antics. Paired with 6 high-quality colouring pencils, children can animate Bluey's world with every shade imaginable. Adding a cherry on top, a sheet of reusable stickers lets kids adorn their masterpieces with extra flair. Whether it's a rainy day indoors or a sunny afternoon in the park, ALLIGATOR's Bluey Colouring Set gives endless artistic fun. Let your little artists dive into a world of colour and creativity with Bluey by their side! Safety Warning Warning! Small Parts, Choking Hazard.
